message:
refactor(codegen): Migrate inline block patterns to withInlineBlock

- mod_helper.zig: discard function
- file.zig: genFileTell, genFileFlush, genFileReadable, genFileWritable, genFileSeekable, genFileFileno, genFileIsatty
- class_methods.zig: runtime.PyValue.from pattern
- assign.zig: @intCast pattern
- math_mod.zig: fix import path and isFinite call

Uses structured withInlineBlock helper to guarantee bracket matching through function structure.
